prompt: This document is to be published on the UK GOV.UK government website. It may apply to one or more of the nations of the UK (England, Wales, Scotland or Northern Ireland). State whether it applies to England and give a short explanation (less than 100 words) for your decision.
reason: This guidance pertains to the duties and responsibilities of charity trustees in relation to accepting, refusing, or returning donations. It is relevant to England as charitable organizations operating in England must adhere to these principles as outlined by the Charity Commission for England and Wales, which governs the operations and regulations of charities within that nation.
